name: YouTube Transcript

evidence.claim: TranscriptAPI is a managed REST API for YouTube data extraction including transcripts, search, channel listing, and playlist extraction.
The API supports Bearer token authentication and offers 100 free credits to start.
TranscriptAPI provides an official MCP server for integrating with AI assistants.
Search citation: TranscriptAPI vs Supadata: YouTube API Comparison | TranscriptAPI

api_notes: The API covers core YouTube workflow endpoints: transcript extraction, search, channel resolution, channel/playlist video listing, and latest upload monitoring.
mcp_notes: TranscriptAPI provides an official MCP server designed for YouTube workflows, including transcript extraction and search, compatible with tools like Claude and ChatGPT.
access_notes: Developers can sign up on the website and get 100 free credits without a credit card. Paid plans are available for higher volume.
auth_notes: Authentication is handled via a Bearer token (API Key) passed in the Authorization header.
one_liner: TranscriptAPI is a hosted REST API and MCP service that provides programmatic access to YouTube transcripts, search, channels, and playlists.
